The spec for the CSV export feature has been approved. Here it is:

APPROVED SPEC: Add CSV export to the reports page.
- Export button on the reports list page
- Generates CSV with columns: date, report_name, status, created_by
- File named "reports-YYYY-MM-DD.csv"
- Works for up to 10,000 rows
- Shows loading state during generation

Please create an implementation plan for this.
